attacking_style: Initiates moves on final climb approaches but lacks explosive power in the final 200-300m, particularly after technical corners where acceleration is critical.
team_tactics: Benefits from Astana support to position for late attacks, but team setup alone cannot compensate for insufficient finishing punch in short sprints.
terrain_preference: Can animate races on climb approaches and positioning phases; exposed on technical finishes requiring sharp accelerations under 300m to go.
vulnerability: Sub-300m sprint finishes after right-hand corners or technical sections where pure explosive power is required; unable to sustain winning moves into final straight.
key_patterns: Initiates winning moves on final climbs but fades before line (2 observations)
Lacks finishing punch in sub-300m sprints despite strong positioning (2 observations)
Power insufficient after technical corners requiring sharp re-acceleration (2 observations)
form_trajectory: negative: demonstrated ability to position and initiate but repeatedly unable to convert due to insufficient finishing power
